rationale: The citing paper is an editorial for a special issue and gives Dolbec et al. (2022) a distinct functional role beyond a passing list mention. It summarizes that study's context, mechanism, and conclusion (religion-based Brazilian schools adapting to marketization) in both Table 1 and dedicated discussion text. The citation is used as evidence for the editorial's broader argument that education research can address supplier-side service transformation and marketing strategy questions. This is therefore a meaningful framing/illustrative use, even though the editorial does not build a new theory directly on that paper.
relation_description: The editorial substantively uses Dolbec et al. (2022) as a featured example in the special issue, summarizing its findings on how school administrators adapt to market pressures. The cited paper supports the editorial's claim that education contexts can generate insights on organizational marketing strategy and service-provider adaptation.
